entity.summary: Chromia-based automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with remaining protocol liquidity but no recent DEX volume in the reviewed period.
entity.notes: Classified inactive rather than dead because protocol TVL remains and the project application domain resolves, while reviewed metrics show zero 30-day DEX volume. No terminal shutdown notice was recovered.

evidence.title: ColorPool DEX application
evidence.notes: First-party DEX application domain remains reachable.

evidence.title: ColorPool protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile reports current Chromia TVL, substantial cumulative volume, and zero 30-day DEX volume in the reviewed snapshot.
